# GQA

# what? 

a module that is used to evaluating the output of an [attention head](-reference-attention-head). 

as compared to MHA, the attention head uses the shared KV between attention heads such that we don't have to scale the memory linear to the size to the attention heads. 

# why? 

reduces memory cost for long context. 


## relevant variants

multi head attention
multi head latent attention
